creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks for the notification. The commit you are referencing to is not the actual commit where it was removed. It was just the preparation stage. The final commit was here:
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=8f80d6dde15c23f550d7f2201299c04e49d91eccv

And I have also removed the references in the docs here:
https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/commit/?id=45da43895e27db2587b9d58e54c81627521bf83fhttps://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/commit/?id=45da43895e27db2587b9d58e54c81627521bf83f
